comment: Per-runtime gzipped wasm size ceilings for the Chio TypeScript SDK. Numbers come from .planning/trajectory/08-browser-edge-sdk.md success criteria. The size-budget.sh wrapper iterates this table, gzips each declared wasm artifact, and fails the build if any entry exceeds its ceiling. Missing artifacts soft-skip when the wasm-pack output has not been generated yet.

browser.rationale: M08 success criterion: < 300 KB gzipped for the browser tarball; wasm artifact dominates the tarball size.

workers.rationale: Cloudflare Workers compressed bundle limit is 3 MB; we hold the SDK wasm contribution to 350 KB to leave 650 KB headroom inside the 1 MB self-imposed total.

edge.rationale: Vercel Edge Function bundle limit is 1 MB compressed; SDK wasm contribution capped at 350 KB to leave room for user code.

deno.rationale: Deno Deploy isolate limit is 50 MB; ceiling kept at 400 KB to bound cold-start cost rather than fit a hard limit.
